use_codes.desc: SMOKING CESSATION AID APPLIED TO THE SKIN
SMOKING CESSATION AID APPLIED TO THE SKIN ON WAKING AND REMOVED PRIOR TO SLEEP AFTER ABOUT 16 HOURS
